notes: Reproduced as reported: SKCanvasView in Blazor WASM does not fill 100% height of its parent flex container. The canvas element's intrinsic size (set by HTML width/height attributes for the drawing buffer at 2x DPI) conflicts with CSS percentage-based heights in flexbox layouts. Canvas CSS height resolves to 550px while the viewport is ~1700px. Confirmed on SkiaSharp.Views.Blazor 3.119.0, 3.119.2 (latest), and main branch source — the issue persists across all versions.

reproductionSteps.description: Create Blazor WASM project with net10.0 TFM and SkiaSharp.Views.Blazor 3.119.0, add reporter's flex layout code
reproductionSteps.command: dotnet new blazorwasm -n Repro --framework net10.0 && cd Repro && dotnet add package SkiaSharp.Views.Blazor --version 3.119.0

filesCreated.description: Blazor WASM project file with WasmBuildNative enabled and SkiaSharp.Views.Blazor 3.119.0
Reporter's exact code: SKCanvasView in a flex container with CSS height:100% on canvas-container and canvas elements

reproductionSteps.description: Build the Blazor WASM project with native compilation
reproductionSteps.output: Build succeeded. 0 Warning(s) 0 Error(s) Time Elapsed 00:00:07.73

reproductionSteps.description: Serve the app and verify canvas sizing in browser with Playwright. Canvas height is 550px while viewport is 1680px — canvas fills only ~33% of available vertical space instead of 100%.
reproductionSteps.output: Console log: REPRO: rendered 2200x1100. JS evaluation: viewport height=1680px, topContainer height=588px, canvasContainer height=556px, canvas CSS height=550px, canvas HTML height=1100. Canvas fills only ~33% of viewport height.

versionResults.notes: Canvas height 550px in 1680px viewport. Blue canvas covers only ~33% of available vertical space.
Same behavior: canvas height 550px in 1732px viewport. No change from reporter's version.
Same behavior on main branch source: canvas height 550px in 1784px viewport. Bug persists in development.

actionability.reason: Reproduced on all tested versions including main branch. The SKCanvasView Blazor component renders a bare canvas element with no default display:block styling. The JS interop sets HTML width/height attributes for the drawing buffer, which changes the canvas intrinsic size and conflicts with CSS percentage-based heights in flexbox.

workarounds: Set style="width:100%; height:100%; display:block;" directly on SKCanvasView component
Use position:absolute on the canvas with inset:0 to decouple from intrinsic sizing
Use explicit pixel dimensions instead of percentage-based heights

actions.description: Labels already correctly applied (type/bug, os/WASM, area/SkiaSharp.Views.Blazor)
